name: Red Snapper in Nut Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fish into serving size portions.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Combine the nuts and bread crumbs in a bowl.
4. Dust the fish with flour.
5. Dredge each piece in egg, then coat with the nut and crumb mixture.
6. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
7. Saute the fish in batches until golden brown on each side, about 2 minutes per batch.
8. Transfer the fish to a baking dish and bake at 350°F for 3-4 minutes.
